points.label: CI/CD Automation

points.label: Infrastructure as Code
points.desc: EKS clusters via Terraform supporting 5+ microservices with fully version-controlled, reproducible environments.

points.label: GitOps Delivery
points.desc: ArgoCD syncing Git to the live cluster continuously — zero manual intervention.

points.label: DevSecOps
points.desc: SonarQube, Trivy, and OWASP dependency checks integrated at every pipeline stage.

points.label: Observability Stack
points.desc: Prometheus + Grafana dashboards tracking system health, resource utilisation, and alerting thresholds.

points.label: Container Strategy
points.desc: Optimised multi-stage Docker builds and image lifecycle management within Kubernetes.
